title: BEM-889 final readiness
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

required_proofs = [
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM883_REGISTRY_SCHEMA_VALIDATION_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM884_OPERATIONAL_RULES_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM885_CHANNEL_ENVELOPE_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM886_WORKSPACE_PROMOTION_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM887_PRODUCT_REPOSITORY_TEMPLATE_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM888_INTEGRATION_SELFTEST_PASS.md'
]
required_tools = [
 'governance/tools/validate_registries.py',
 'governance/tools/validate_workspace_promotion.py',
 'governance/tools/validate_product_repository_registry.py',
 'governance/tools/run_bem880_selftest.py'
]
required_state = [
 'governance/state/architecture_registry.json',
 'governance/state/objects_registry.json',
 'governance/state/task_registry.json',
 'governance/state/rule_registry.json',
 'governance/state/channel_registry.json',
 'governance/state/workspace_registry.json',
 'governance/state/workspace_promotion_policy.json',
 'governance/state/product_repository_registry.json',
 'governance/state/testing_policy.json',
 'governance/state/message_envelope_schema.json'
]
missing = [p for p in required_proofs + required_tools + required_state if not Path(p).exists()]
backlog_pending = []
backlog_path = Path('governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
if backlog_path.exists():
    backlog = json.loads(backlog_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    backlog_pending = [i.get('id') for i in backlog.get('items', []) if i.get('status') != 'completed']
else:
    missing.append(str(backlog_path))

selftest_status = 'UNKNOWN'
selftest_path = Path('governance/reports/BEM888_INTEGRATION_SELFTEST.json')
if selftest_path.exists():
    selftest_status = json.loads(selftest_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')).get('status','UNKNOWN')
else:
    missing.append(str(selftest_path))

status = 'READY' if not missing and not backlog_pending and selftest_status == 'PASS' else 'NOT_READY'
readiness = {
  'bem':'BEM-889',
  'status':status,
  'source':'BEM-880 accepted roadmap execution + BEM-882 executable backlog',
  'proofs_checked':required_proofs,
  'tools_checked':required_tools,
  'state_checked':required_state,
  'missing':missing,
  'backlog_pending':backlog_pending,
  'selftest_status':selftest_status,
  'result':'repository baseline is ready for next development stage' if status == 'READY' else 'repository baseline still has blockers'
}
Path('governance/state/repository_readiness.json').write_text(json.dumps(readiness, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

manifest = '# BEM-889 Delivery manifest\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nAccepted roadmap: BEM-879 protocol v1.7.\n\nExecuted baseline: BEM-880.\n\nExecutable hardening: BEM-883 through BEM-888.\n\nProofs:\n'
for p in required_proofs:
    manifest += '- ' + p + '\n'
manifest += '\nTools:\n'
for p in required_tools:
    manifest += '- ' + p + '\n'
manifest += '\nState files:\n'
for p in required_state:
    manifest += '- ' + p + '\n'
manifest += '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n\nPending backlog: ' + (', '.join(backlog_pending) if backlog_pending else 'none') + '\n\nSelftest: ' + selftest_status + '\n'
Path('governance/dispatch/BEM889_DELIVERY_MANIFEST.md').write_text(manifest, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM889_FINAL_READINESS.md').write_text('# BEM-889 Final readiness report\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n\nPending backlog: ' + (', '.join(backlog_pending) if backlog_pending else 'none') + '\n\nSelftest: ' + selftest_status + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM889_REPOSITORY_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-889 repository readiness proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\nPending backlog: ' + (', '.join(backlog_pending) if backlog_pending else 'none') + '\nSelftest: ' + selftest_status + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
curator = '# BEM-889 FINAL EXECUTION RESPONSE\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nFindings:\n- Accepted roadmap v1.7 was executed.\n- BEM-882 executable backlog was completed.\n- Registry validation, operational rules, channel envelope, workspace promotion, product repository registration and integration selftest are implemented.\n\nEvidence:\n- governance/dispatch/BEM889_DELIVERY_MANIFEST.md\n- governance/state/repository_readiness.json\n- ' + str(marker) + '\n\nRecommendation:\n- Treat the repository baseline as READY for the next development stage if Status is READY.\n'
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM889_FINAL_EXECUTION_RESPONSE.md').write_text(curator, encoding='utf-8')

changed_files.extend(['governance/state/repository_readiness.json','governance/dispatch/BEM889_DELIVERY_MANIFEST.md','governance/reports/BEM889_FINAL_READINESS.md',str(marker),'governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM889_FINAL_EXECUTION_RESPONSE.md'])
ops_applied.append('BEM889 final readiness ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
